text: According to my psychiatrist and to what I had read, lamictal could be very helpful for people with PTSD. I had tried dozens of meds over the years and, at the time, was totally crippled with anxiety despite being on all the other meds. listed above. Hours after starting Lamictal I was given relief and the anxiety and dissociative symptoms reduced markedly. None that I noticed I was on 25 mg for a week or perhaps two, then raised the dose to 50 mg. I have been on this dose for many years now, along with the rest of the meds I take to manage symptoms.
